description: Deed of sale for a cistern (ṣihrīj). In Arabic. The buyer [...] b. ʿAlī b. Khalaf al-[...] al-Bazzāz(?) is the brother of the seller, Aḥmad b. ʿAlī (l. 2). The property is in Alexandria (l. 3). The transaction is for 12 out of the 24 shares (four lines from the bottom). The term ṣihrīj appears both four lines and two lines from the bottom.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
